category_sources: source_facts.description says it executes Cypher against Neo4j; official Neo4j Operations Manual describes Cypher Shell as a tool for running queries and administrative tasks.
display_name_sources: Official Neo4j Operations Manual page title is Cypher Shell.
docs_sources: Official Neo4j documentation has Cypher Shell pages in the Operations Manual.
repo_sources: Official neo4j/cypher-shell repository states Cypher Shell moved to https://github.com/neo4j/neo4j; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Cypher and Neo4j; official Neo4j docs describe the shell for query and administration use.
